segments.text: Speaking through that bair coming out from Game & Watch's side, actually connects and takes out
Miya's first stock. What are these conversions coming out from SuperDog's part?
He's having to find a nice take. Oh, but the second!

full_text: Speaking through that bair coming out from Game & Watch's side, actually connects and takes out Miya's first stock. What are these conversions coming out from SuperDog's part? He's having to find a nice take. Oh, but the second!

corrections.rule: Player name: Mija→Miya; Smash term: toque→stock
